{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Long Silence
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Long Silence]] was an event brought about by a previous [[Iron King]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c8">''The Engineer'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon events]]
